qualityLevel.title: Global Quality Level
qualityLevel.subtitle: Applies to all sources
qualityLevel.mediumDescription: Medium bitrate, balanced quality and data

formatPriority.title: YouTube Format Priority
formatPriority.subtitle: Only applies to YouTube audio-only streams
formatPriority.opusDescription: Good quality, small size, less compatible

authForPlay.title: Playback Authentication
authForPlay.subtitle: Use logged-in account credentials only when a source needs them for playback.
authForPlay.bilibiliDescription: Keep off unless playback needs member or private-content access.
authForPlay.youtubeDescription: Keep off unless playback needs account-only access.
authForPlay.neteaseDescription: Enabled by default for VIP and account-restricted tracks.
